title: CatShark
description: This resource pack adds a totem in the form of a cat in a shark costume.
body:
**This resource pack adds a totem in the form of a cat in a shark costume.**

---
To get a totem in the form of a cat in a shark costume, you need:
1. Get the totem of immortality
2. You need to get the anvil 
3. Rename the totem on the anvil "shark"
